heading: Imposition of Countervailing Duties
label: I Imposition of Countervailing Duties
notes: CodificationThe designations “SUBTITLE IV” and “ I” were in the original “TITLE VII” and “Subtitle A” respectively, and were editorially changed in order to conform the numbering format of this subtitle to the usages employed in the codification of the remainder of the Tariff Act of 1930 as originally enacted.Part
